description:
Music player designed with Material You Features
  • Enjoy your favorite music in a variety of formats, including MP3, FLAC, OGG, WAV, and more
  • No telemetry, no ads
  • M3U playlist export
  • Global Library Search
  • Smart Playlists
  • Listening Stats
  • Easily browse tracks, albums, artists, and genres, and create custom playlists
  • Enhance your listening experience with synchronized lyrics from LRCLIB (Optional, can be disabled)
  • Manually update track details or fetch accurate info from MusicBrainz
  • Designed with Material You and supports dynamic color palettes
All music stays on your device. Network access is off by default and must be turned on in Settings — LRCLIB lyrics lookups and MusicBrainz metadata queries are opt-in only.
